reasoning: The Krishak Bandhu money came, and it is still coming. The panchayat people — they are TMC — they fixed the road and helped when we needed it, even when the cyclone came. I am a Santali, my people have been here forever. I don't need speeches about Hindu this and Hindu that. I need my road to hold, my land to get support, my children to have school and cards that work. TMC has done this. Why would I vote for someone new to take a chance on when I see the work already done?
primary_drivers: Krishak Bandhu and welfare schemes actually received and continuing
Local TMC panchayat delivers concrete help with roads and documents
Hindutva messaging doesn't appeal to Santali identity and community
